creator: jonathan.chen@itouch.co.nz
text:
The current desktuils/kdepim port doesn't build kpilot.

Fix: The following patch will modify the port to allow kpilot to build and
install. Unsure of kpilot's working status. Note that it creates a patch
to the configure.in file.
How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/deskutils/kdepim
# make && make install
# ls -l /usr/local/bin/kpilot
